% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\usepackage{quiver}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}[ampersand replacement=\&,cramped]
	\&\& {M'} \&\& \\
	{\Sigma_-} \&\&\&\& {\Sigma_+} \\
	\&\& M
	\arrow["{\gamma_-'}", hook, from=2-1, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{\gamma_-}"', hook', from=2-1, to=3-3]
	\arrow["{\gamma_+'}"', hook', from=2-5, to=1-3]
	\arrow["{\gamma_+}", hook, from=2-5, to=3-3]
	\arrow["\phi", from=3-3, to=1-3]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
